signals.title: Tech Identity Without Visible Practice
signals.evidence_anchor: The engineering essay makes technology central to the applicant's identity and future direction.
signals.direct_read: The record contains strong technology-facing language but little visible self-directed technical building work in activities.
signals.what_remains_open: Whether the applicant's technology-facing identity is already grounded in lived practice or still mostly aspirational.
signals.why_it_matters: Resolving this changes how the applicant's entire technology-facing self-presentation should be understood.

signals.title: Strong Scores, Real Reasoning Unknown
signals.evidence_anchor: The academic and test record shows very high performance, especially in mathematics.
signals.direct_read: The applicant performs strongly in structured academic problem-solving across school and JEE Mains.
signals.what_remains_open: How the applicant reasons when the problem is open-ended, ambiguous, or not exam-shaped.
signals.why_it_matters: This determines whether the applicant's evident capability extends beyond structured performance settings.

signals.title: Community Action and Actual Ownership
signals.evidence_anchor: The community essay describes initiating a stray-dog support effort with classmates and responding to neighborhood resistance.
signals.direct_read: The applicant can narrate a socially grounded initiative involving persistence, persuasion, and coordination.
signals.what_remains_open: How much of the decision-making and adaptation in that effort was personally owned by the applicant in practice.
signals.why_it_matters: Resolving this changes whether the story reads as real agency or mostly participant-level involvement.

themes.title: Aspirational Technologist or Practiced Builder
themes.framing: This theme concerns the relationship between the applicant's stated technology identity and their demonstrated lived practice.
themes.what_this_theme_must_resolve: Whether the applicant's technology-facing identity is already practiced and self-directed or still primarily aspirational.

themes.title: Initiative, Ownership, and Real Agency
themes.framing: This theme concerns whether the applicant's stories of contribution reflect genuine ownership under friction rather than surface participation.
themes.what_this_theme_must_resolve: How the applicant actually acts, decides, and adapts when responsibility becomes real.
